overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person walk through a snowy historic estate at night. The camera approaches a stone archway, enters a courtyard with a central fountain, circles around it, and exits through another archway. The scene features dramatic blue-hour lighting with warm lamp illumination contrasting against the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered estate path approaching stone gatehouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path toward the illuminated stone archway entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway with triangular pediment and central spire, illuminated by warm lamplight
tall stone estate wall running parallel to the path
tall stone estate wall with snow-covered coping stones
ornate black iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
snow-laden hedge rows flanking the pathway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a snow-covered path flanked by stone walls and hedges, approaching a large illuminated stone archway that serves as the entrance to the estate. The path is lined with ornate street lamps casting warm light against the blue snow.

events.description: passing through the stone archway from the exterior path into the interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the estate courtyard

entered.detail: large domed building with classical architecture visible beyond the courtyard
circular tiered fountain covered in snow and ice
snow-covered trees visible through the archway opening

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed entrance path to the open courtyard. The estate building with its distinctive dome becomes visible on the right, and a central fountain appears in the distance beyond the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular courtyard with central fountain and benches

events.description: turning right to circle around the central fountain
continuing along the curved path toward the exit archway

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard in a circular path, passing the central fountain and stone benches

entered.detail: snow-covered stone benches lining the courtyard path
tall stone walls of the main estate building with windows
dense cluster of snow-laden trees surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exploring the open courtyard, circling around the frozen central fountain. The path curves past stone benches and snow-covered trees, with the historic estate building walls visible on the right side. The camera follows the circular track around the fountain plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit archway leading to outer grounds

events.description: approaching the exit archway to leave the courtyard
turning left to align with the exit archway passage

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the exit archway, leaving the courtyard for the outer grounds

entered.detail: stone archway serving as the exit from the courtyard to the outer grounds
open snow-covered field with distant trees visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: Approaching the exit archway on the far side of the courtyard. The camera turns toward the opening and passes through the stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed estate grounds to the open outer fields visible beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded, lamp-lit entrance path through a grand estate courtyard and out into the open winter fields. It begins by moving along a snow-covered path flanked by stone walls and hedges, guided by ornate street lamps that cast a warm glow against the blue-hour snow. As the camera passes through a large illuminated stone archway, the enclosed path opens into a wide courtyard where a domed estate building emerges on the right and a central fountain appears in the distance. The movement then curves in a circular track around the frozen fountain plaza, gliding past stone benches and snow-dusted trees. Finally, the camera turns toward a second stone archway on the far side of the grounds, passing through the opening to transition from the historic estate into the expansive outer fields.
